message.content:
# UI Design Description: Mobile Portfolio

## 1. Overall Layout and Structure
The design is a mobile portfolio displayed on an iPhone with a black bezel, centered on a solid black background. The layout is a single-page vertical scroll design with a dark gradient background. The content is organized in a top-to-bottom flow with clear sections for header, introduction, skills, and projects. The interface uses a minimalist approach with ample whitespace and a modern, tech-focused aesthetic.

## 2. Text Content
- "Bruno Pau" (profile name, top left)
- "Menu" (top right)
- "Download CV" (top right, below Menu)
- "HELLO, MY NAME IS BRUNO" (main heading)
- "And I build websites." (subheading)
- "Full Stack MERN Developer |" (skills heading)
- "MongoDB - Express - React -" (tech stack)
- "Node.js | Creating efficient," (tech stack continuation)
- "scalable web applications" (skills description)
- "focused on user experience." (skills description continuation)
- "Projects" (section heading)

## 3. Colors Used
- Background: Black (#000000)
- Phone bezel: Black with white outline
- Screen background: Dark gradient (deep purple to green)
- Text colors:
  - Main headings: Bright green (#00FF00 or similar)
  - Body text: Light gray/white (#E0E0E0)
  - Section headings: White (#FFFFFF)
- Accent colors: Green (#00FF00) for highlighted text

## 4. Component Types
- Mobile phone frame (iPhone-style)
- Profile header with name and menu
- Main heading section
- Skills section with tech stack
- Projects section with placeholder card
- Navigation menu (implied by "Menu" text)
- Download CV button (implied by text)

## 5. Typography
- Profile name: Sans-serif, medium weight, small size
- Menu text: Sans-serif, regular weight, small size
- Main heading: Sans-serif, bold weight, medium-large size
- Subheading: Sans-serif, regular weight, medium size
- Skills heading: Sans-serif, regular weight, medium size
- Tech stack: Sans-serif, regular weight, small size
- Skills description: Sans-serif, regular weight, small size
- Section heading: Sans-serif, bold weight, medium size

## 6. Spacing and Alignment
- Content is left-aligned within the phone screen
- Profile name is left-aligned at the top
- Menu and Download CV are right-aligned at the top
- Main heading has significant top margin from the profile section
- Subheading is directly below main heading with small spacing
- Skills section has medium top margin from subheading
- Tech stack items are stacked vertically with small spacing
- Projects section has medium top margin from skills section
- All text has consistent left margin from screen edge
- Placeholder project card has medium top margin from section heading

## 7. Icons/Images
- Small circular profile picture (left of "Bruno Pau")
- Menu icon (implied by "Menu" text, likely hamburger menu)
- Download CV icon (implied by text, likely download icon)
- Projects placeholder card (dark rectangular area with gradient)

## 8. Navigation Elements
- "Menu" text in top right corner (likely hamburger menu)
- "Download CV" text (likely button)
- Implied navigation to projects section
- Implied navigation to other portfolio sections

The design emphasizes a clean, modern aesthetic with high contrast between the dark background and bright green text, creating a tech-focused, professional appearance suitable for a developer portfolio.
